scripts.gate: concurrently -n js,go -c blue,green "bun run gate:js" "bun run gate:go"
scripts.gate:js: cd packages/oxlint-plugin-effect && bunx tsgo --noEmit && bun test
scripts.gate:go: cd packages/tsgolint-effect && go build -o /dev/null ./cmd/tsgolint && go test ./internal/rules/effect_.../
scripts.release: cd packages/oxlint-plugin-effect && bun run build && cd ../.. && changeset publish
